p2p_enrich.notes: Added 3 repo CI commands as pass_to_pass tests: (1) test_repo_typecheck - runs 'npm run typecheck' (react-router typegen && tsc), (2) test_repo_build - runs 'npm run build' for production build verification, (3) test_repo_translations - runs 'npm run check-translation-completeness'. Discovered from GitHub workflows: fe-unit-tests.yml, lint.yml. All 3 commands verified passing on base commit df4fea6aca28d3050189a1b19d91ad3d129a95cb. Skipped 'npm run test' (full test suite) due to pre-existing flaky test failure in conversation-websocket-handler.test.tsx.

validate.notes: Fixed test_unit_tests_pass to handle missing unit test files for new components. Fixed test.sh to correctly capture pytest exit code. All 4 checks pass: Docker build OK, NOP test reward=0, Gold test reward=1, Rubric empty.
